title: Module 1
content:
Fundamentals of Fracture– molecular failure process. Failure modes: brittle
failure, ductile failure, ductile-brittle transitions, toughened polymers,
mechanisms of rubber toughening, failure of highly filled systems/composites.
Fracture mechanics: linear elastic fracture mechanics (LEFM), fracture
predictions based on stress concentration and stress intensity factor, fracture
predictions based on an energy balance

title: Module 2
content:
Fracture Mechanics– Short term and long-term test methods and analysis:
impact strength, impact failure, creep rupture, fatigue, friction and wear

title: Module 3
content:
Failure analysis and degradation of polymers– Identification of strategic
weakness, stability of polymer structures, environmental effect on polymer
failure - weather, thermal, photo and oxidation

title: Module 4
content:
Degradation Mechanisms- Ionizing radiation, hydrolysis, environmental
stress cracking-crazing and cracking, electrical treeing and water treeing,
chemical degradation, electrochemical degradation, biodegradation, physical
ageing.
